metadata.description: Verification by re-execution: re-run the work, recompute the headline number from raw outputs, prove or break the claim.

plugins.name: calma
plugins.description: Verify a computational result (a metric, a backtest, a cleaned dataset, an aggregate) by re-executing it in a sandbox and recomputing the number from the raw outputs - the verdict comes from deterministic scripts, not a model's opinion.
